title: theboysvanilla+
description: A general overhaul modpack I made to play with the boys, it has new world gen, farming and cooking overhaul, new weapons and armor, etc
body:
**ABOUT**

---

This modpack is very loosely categorized as vanilla plus. It includes various quality of life mods, as well as a revamped overworld, nether, and end world generation along with new and improved structures . You'll also find flying machines, RPG progression for both the player and enemy mobs, and additional mods for furniture, building, cooking, weapons, and armor. 

In summary, this modpack is a complete overhaul with a focus on exploration, long-term progression, optimization, and improved quality of life features. 

Although I initially made this modpack for my own group of friends, I hope you enjoy playing it as well.

---
